# confirmDeleteAccount

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the confirmDeleteAccount mutation

## Usage

```bash
csdk confirm-delete-account --input.clientMutationId <value> --input.userId <value> --input.token <value>
```
